Petition For Order Directing Establishment Of Pooled Special Needs Trust Account; Setting Bond; Authorization Of Trustee'S Fees; And Approving Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bryan Beard appeared by zoom for Rhonda Elliott (petitioner).

Mr. Beard addressed the issues raised in the probate examiner's notes regarding the request for living expenses, the request to invest in mutual funds and venue. The Petition for Order Directing Establishment of Pooled Special Needs Trust Account, etc. is under submission. The court waives the venue issue. Mr. Beard will submit a revised order.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
